trees.name: Arms
trees.description: Devastating two-handed physical combat and combat tactician.

talents.name: Deep Wounds
talents.description: Bleed-infused strikes increase all physical damage dealt by 15%

talents.name: Impale
talents.description: Precise targeting increases physical critical strike chance by 10%

talents.name: Overpower

trees.name: Fury
trees.description: High-speed dual-wielding and aggressive rage amplification.

talents.name: Enrage
talents.description: Furious adrenaline increases movement speed by 25%

talents.name: Flurry
talents.description: Furious strikes increase physical damage dealt by 20%

talents.name: Bloodthirst
talents.description: Unlocks Bloodthirst: An instant strike that generates 15 Rage (costs 0 Rage, 4s Cooldown).

talents.name: Shield Slam

talents.name: Holy Word: Serenity
